response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video for vocal music. 2. Determined that the background music is purely instrumental throughout the entire duration. 3. Defined the entire video as one scene since the activity (Minecraft gameplay) is consistent.
response.global_summary: A continuous clip of a Minecraft stream where the performer works on a chicken farm.

scenes.description: The performer is playing Minecraft, working on a chicken farm by moving chickens into a pen and building structures. Instrumental background music plays throughout.
